basic_details.job_title: ESIC Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 17 Young Professional, Consultants and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Young Professional, Consultants Grade-1, Consultants Grade-2 and Senior Consultants
basic_details.short_information: Employees State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Delhi Young Professional / Consultants Grade-1 / Consultants Grade-2 and Senior Consultants Notification 2026 has been released on 27.04.2026 on the official website ESIC Official Website. A total of 17 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Delhi Recruitment 2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Young Professional: Max 32 years, Consultant Grade-1: Max 45 years, Consultant Grade-2: Max 50 years, Senior Consultant: Max 62 years
age_limit.details: Young Professional: Maximum age limit is 32 years. Consultant Grade-1: Maximum age limit is 45 years. Consultant Grade-2: Maximum age limit is 50 years. Senior Consultant: Maximum age limit is 62 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules: SC/ST - 5 years, OBC - 3 years, PwBD - UR-10 years, OBC-13 years, SC/ST- 15 years, Ex-Servicemen - UR- 3 years, OBC- 6 years, SC/ST- 8 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelors' or Post Graduate degree in relevant fields, MBA
qualification.details: Young Professional (ICT-Application): Bachelors' or Post Graduate degree in Computer Science/IT / Software Engineering with 1 year of experience. Young Professional (ICT- Information Security): Bachelors' or Post Graduate degree in Computer Science/IT / Software Engineering with 1 year of experience. Young Professional ESI Benefit: Bachelor of Engineering (IT)/B. Tech (IT) or Masters in Information Technology/ Computer Application/Statistics/Mathematics/Economics/ Financial Management/Data Science/Data Analytics with minimum one year of experience. Young Professional (Finance): MBA (Finance) from recognized University /CFA with minimum 1-year post-qualification experience. Young Professional (Medical Services)- Post-1: Master's Degree in Healthcare Management / Public Health / Health Administration with minimum 1 year of experience. Young Professional Medical Services (Quality Assurance, Accreditation & Patient Safety Cell)- Post-2: Master's Degree in Healthcare Management / Public Health / Health Administration with minimum 1 year of experience. Young Professional Medical Services (PMJAY)- Post-1: MBA in Health Administration with at-least 01-year of experience. Young Professional (IT) (Property Management Division): B.E./B.Tech (Computer Science/IT) OR any equivalent discipline with proficiency in Data Analytics and MS Excel, with 0-2 years of experience. Consultant Grade-1 (Information & Communication Technology): Bachelors' or post graduate degree in Computer Science/IT/Statistics/Mathematics with 3-8 years of experience. Consultant Grade-1 (Actuarial): Cleared the following exams conducted by IAI: CS1, CS2, CM1, CB1 with minimum 3 years of experience. Consultant Grade-1 (Medical Service) (PMJAY): Please refer to the official notification for eligibility details. Consultant Grade-1 (Quality Assurance, Accreditation & Patient Safety Cell): Postgraduate Degree / Diploma in Hospital Administration / Healthcare Management / Public Health / Health Administration / Quality Management OR Master's Degree in Hospital Administration / Healthcare Management / Public Health / Health Systems Management with minimum 3-5 years of experience. Consultant Grade-1 Public Relations (Social Media): Any Graduate with 3 to 8 years of experience. Consultant Grade-2 (ICT-Network and Infrastructure): Bachelors' or Post Graduate degree in Computer Science/Information technology with 8-15 years of experience. Consultant Grade-2 (Medical Service): Masters in Hospital Administration with 8 -15 years of experience. Senior Consultant (ICT -Management and Technology Profile): Bachelors' or Post Graduate degree in Computer Science/IT / Software Engineering with MBA (regular) with 15 years and above experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Young Professional: Rs. 70,000; Consultant Grade-1: Rs. 80,000-1,45,000; Consultant Grade-2: Rs. 1,45,000-2,65,000; Senior Consultant: Rs. 2,65,000-3,30,000

selection_process: Screening Committee shortlists eligible applicants Consultancy Evaluation & Selection Committee evaluates and recommends candidates
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ESIC Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ESIC Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ESIC Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the ESIC Delhi Recruitment 2026 is 04 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for ESIC Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 17 vacancies available for the posts of Young Professional, Consultant Grade-1, Consultant Grade-2, and Senior Consultant in ESIC Delhi Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Young Professional post is a Bachelors' or Post Graduate degree in Computer Science/IT / Software Engineering, with specific requirements varying slightly by specialization.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for a Senior Consultant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Consultant post is 62 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for a Consultant Grade-1?
faq.answer: The salary for a Consultant Grade-1 ranges from Rs. 80,000 to Rs. 1,45,000 per month, depending on experience and qualifications.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for ESIC Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the ESIC Delhi Recruitment 2026. Candidates should verify this on the official website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Screening Committee to shortlist eligible applicants, followed by an evaluation and recommendation by the Consultancy Evaluation & Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from across India apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, applications are invited from eligible candidates across India for this recruitment drive by ESIC Delhi.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of the employment for these positions?
faq.answer: The employment for these positions is purely on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
